overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical beach with palm trees and a massive mechanical Tallneck in the distance, followed by a transition to a snowy mountain landscape with frozen lakes and snow-covered peaks. The camera follows in third-person as the character walks through shallow water and across ice.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with shallow lagoon

events.description: screen begins to fade to black indicating scene transition

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks through shallow water along the tropical beach, heading toward a large mechanical structure in the distance while the camera circles to show her profile against the palm trees

entered.detail: massive giraffe-like machine structure towering above the trees in the distance
tall tropical palm trees lining the left side of the beach shore
tropical palm trees with green fronds on the right side of the beach
misty mountains visible in the background across the water
bright red vegetation growing along the sandy shore
clear shallow water covering the sandy beach floor

segments.scene_description: Aloy explores a sunlit tropical beach with palm trees and red flowering vegetation. She walks through shallow lagoon water toward a massive mechanical Tallneck visible in the distance, with misty mountains framing the background. The camera smoothly follows and circles around her, showcasing the vibrant coastal environment before the scene fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen mountain lake surrounded by snow-covered peaks

events.description: scene transitions from tropical beach to snowy mountain landscape with fade from black
bright sun flare appears on the left side of the screen as the camera turns toward the light

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks across a frozen lake in the snowy mountains, moving toward the center of the ice field as the camera pans to reveal the expansive valley and bright sun

entered.detail: towering snow-covered mountain peaks surrounding the frozen valley on all sides
cracked ice surface reflecting the sky and mountains with visible fracture lines
snow-covered rocky outcrops and boulders along the lake shore

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a stark snowy mountain landscape where Aloy walks across a frozen lake surrounded by towering snow-covered peaks. The bright midday sun creates a dramatic lens flare as she explores the ice field, with the camera capturing the expansive white valley, cracked ice patterns, and rocky snow formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that transforms from a vibrant tropical coastline into a stark, frozen mountain wilderness. It begins with the camera circling Aloy as she explores a sunlit beach, wading through the shallow waters of a lagoon surrounded by palm trees and red flowering vegetation. As she moves toward a massive mechanical Tallneck framed by misty mountains, the lush coastal colors fade into a deep black transition. The scene then opens onto a vast snowy landscape where the camera tracks Aloy across a frozen lake, with the environment shifting from tropical warmth to a bright, midday glare. Finally, the view expands across a white valley of cracked ice and rocky formations, framed by towering snow-covered peaks under a dramatic lens flare.
